snippet.title: Philip Morris CEO Jacek Olczak on earnings beat: Driven by smoke-free product growth
snippet.description:
Jacek Olczak, Philip Morris International CEO, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss the current environment for cigarettes, how far along the company is on the journey to being smoke-free, and the pricing environment between traditional tobacco products and smoke-free products. snippet.title: CEO Jacek Olczak Exclusive Conversation At 7th Edition Of Global Business Summit | Latest Updates
snippet.description:
Times Now talks exclusively with Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of Philip Morris International at the 7th edition of Global Business Summit (GBS). Jacek Olczak aims at delivering smoke free future. He said, 'smoking causes harm and smokers should quit smoking, so we decided to put chemicals that cause harm.' India is being identified with antifragile. India has shown the world how to convert calamities into opportunities. Listen in to the report! Keep watching Times Now to know more in detail!

 #globalbusinesssummit2023 #ceojacekolczak #7theditionofgbs #timesnow #timesnownews #philipmorrisinternational #globalbusinesssummit2023ceojacek

snippet.title: Jacek Olczak, CEO, Philip Morris International: Sustainable Economy for the Greater Good: GBS 2023
snippet.description:
Here's what Jacek Olczak, CEO, Philip Morris International has to say on “Sustainable Economy for the Greater Good” at The Economic Times Global Business Summit.

Do Follow Global Business Summit on:
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/4823250/admin/  
Twitter: https://twitter.com/ET_GBS  
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ETGlobalBusinessSummit  
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/et_globalbusinesssummit/ 

ABOUT GLOBAL BUSINESS SUMMIT:
Global Business Summit, a flagship initiative of The Times Group, has heeded this call and will provide a platform that will bring together visionaries, thought leaders, heads of state, policy makers, climate advocates, academicians, and corporate heads to cohesively drive this agenda and exert the momentum needed to achieve this glorious vision.

Conceived in 2015, and now in its 7th edition, Global Business Summit 2023 seeks to provide solutions to key macroeconomic challenges being faced in the current milieu by curating government-to-government interactions, business to government meetings, business-to-business engagements and to serve as a conduit for corporates and governments to secure investments from domestic and international allies that will become a part of India’s growth story.
snippet.channelTitle: The Times Group ET NOW Global Business Summit

snippet.title: ETGBS 2023| Sustainable economy for greater good: Jacek Olczak, CEO, Philip Morris International
snippet.description:
Speaking on day 2 of the 7th edition of The Economic Times, Global Business Summit, Jacek Olczak, CEO of Philip Morris International, talks about how innovative science-based products that can be matched with policies to encourage smokers to switch to less harmful alternatives.
